proposal.name: reduced-stochastic-heun-edm-nfe20
proposal.hypothesis: Reduce stochasticity from previous best run to find a more optimal balance between noise injection and deterministic refinement, potentially further lowering FID.
proposal.timestep_or_noise_schedule: edm discretization with linear sigma schedule, same as baseline
proposal.update_rule: stochastic heun with reduced noise injection
proposal.stochastic_updates: enabled with S_churn=20, S_min=0.02, S_max=30, S_noise=1
proposal.budget_allocation: maximum number of Heun steps under the fixed NFE budget, same as baseline
